untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit IV (implied volatility) and RV (realized volatility) indicators with measurable spread thresholds and persistence duration tracking. Available indicators include hvol_20 (historical volatility proxy) and india_vix (volatility index), but the signal's core requirement—comparing forward-looking IV against backward-looking RV with specific threshold parameters and time-persistence logic—cannot be fully expressed with the available indicator set. The signal also requires conviction adjustment based on mispricing magnitude, which is not representable in the condition-based rule structure.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used hvol_20 < india_vix as a heuristic for IV > RV (sell premium condition), with india_vix threshold > 0.02 to filter HIGH_VOL regime. Exit when spread narrows (hvol_20 >= india_vix). However, this does not capture the precise IV-RV differential, persistence requirement (% of option life), or conviction scaling. A proper implementation requires custom IV/RV calculation functions and state tracking not available in the standard indicator library.
